questions.question: Which Indian institution has partnered with Google for social impact lending programme targeted for Micro enterprises?
questions.explanation: SIDBI – Small Industries Development Bank of India has partnered with Google for a impact lending programme targeted for micro enterprises, under which financial assistance upto Rs.1 crore would be given. The scheme specifically targets micro enterprises having turnover up to Rs. 5 crore with a special focus on women entrepreneurs.

questions.question: Which place in India, was the East Asian bird species “Korean flycatcher” spotted recently?
questions.explanation: The yellow-rumped flycatcher also known as the Korean flycatcher or the tricolor flycatcher is a bird species found in East Asian countries like Mongolia, Transbaikal, southern China, Korea and Japan. Recently, the bird was spotted in Nanmangalam forest in Chennai, Tamil Nadu. Due to their stable population, the species has been classified as “Least Concern” as per IUCN.

questions.question: Which organisation leads the World Philosophy Day every year?
questions.explanation: Philosophy Day is observed on the third Thursday of November every year. This year, it is observed on November 18. The day promotes an academic exchange of philosophy for the development of human thought. World Philosophy Day was initially established by the United Nations Educational, Scientific and Cultural Organization (UNESCO) on 21 November 2002. This year, World Philosophy Day will celebrate “different interactions of human beings in their social, cultural, geographical and political environment.”

questions.question: Which Union Ministry has set up a full-fledged Sustainable Development Cell (SDC)?

options.label: A
options.text: Ministry of Forest, Environment and Climate Change

questions.explanation: Ministry of Coal has established a full-fledged Sustainable Development Cell (SDC). The cell has been set up to advice, mentor and plan action to minimise the adverse impact of mining. SDC is formulating future policy framework for environmental mitigation in Coal and Lignite sector of our country. Coal India Ltd. (CIL) and its subsidiaries along with Singareni Coal Company Ltd. (SCCL) & NLC India Ltd. (NLCIL) has already started related works.

questions.question: What is the uniform Goods and services tax (GST) rate on fabrics, apparel, and footwear, from January 2022?
questions.explanation: The Central Board of Indirect Taxes and Customs has notified a uniform goods and services tax rate of 12 per cent on fabrics, apparel, and footwear. The new rate aims to correct the inverted duty structure and the changed rates will come into effect from January 1, 2022. Earlier the GST Rate was 5 per cent for sale value up to Rs 1,000 per piece in the case of apparels and per pair in the case of footwear.

questions.question: Which Indian state has recently constituted a Fin-Tech Governing Council?
questions.explanation: The Tamil Nadu government has constituted a FinTech Governing Council under the chairmanship of the Industries Minister Thangam Thennarasu. The state’s Chief Secretary V Irai Anbu will be the Vice Chairman. The state is set to launch the fintech policy at the Investment Conclave. Tamil Nadu government has already started the implementation of a fintech city in Chennai at a cost of ₹165 crore.

questions.question: Who is the author of the book titled ‘Pandemonium: The Great Indian Banking Tragedy’?
questions.explanation: Senior journalist Tamal Bandyopadhyay won the Tata Literature Live! Award for his book Pandemonium: The Great Indian Banking Tragedy. Pandemonium was selected under the business book of the year category. He had earlier received an award at Kalinga Literary Festival for the same book, which is said to be an insider story of the India’s banking system.

questions.question: What is the name of the mega military exercise undertaken by India in Kutch to test combat readiness?
questions.explanation: Sagar Shakti, mega military exercise was recently undertaken by India in Kutch to test combat readiness. The four-day high-intensity military exercise conducted in the Creek sector of the Kutch peninsula witnessed participation of the Indian Army, Indian Navy, Indian Air Force, Indian Coast Guard, Border Security Force, Gujarat Police and the Marine Police. The exercise was organised by the Indian Army’s Southern Command.

questions.question: ‘Shaheen-1A’ is a surface to surface ballistic missile of which country?
questions.explanation: Pakistan has conducted a successful test launch of an indigenously developed Shaheen-1A surface to surface ballistic missile. As per the country, the test was aimed at re-validating certain design and technical parameters of the weapon system. The Shaheen-1A is an extended-range variant of the Shaheen 1 (Hatf 4) missile, with an estimated 900km range.

questions.question: AYUSH Ministry has inaugurated the Ayurveda Parv-2021 in which state/UT?
questions.explanation: Minister of State for Ayush-Munjpara Mahedrabhai virtually inaugurated the Ayurveda Parv-2021 in New Delhi. It is a three-day event, which has been organised to promote Ayurveda. An exhibition has been arranged with participation of Pharmaceutical companies. It aims for coordination and better utilization of Ayurvedic research, education and manufacturing of medicines.
